hooks.command: gh run list -L 1 -b main --workflow="Deploy to GitHub Pages" --json conclusion,displayTitle,url 2>/dev/null | jq -c 'if .[0].conclusion == "failure" then {systemMessage: ("Last GitHub Pages deploy FAILED: \"" + .[0].displayTitle + "\" — " + .[0].url), hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: ("WARNING: The latest \"Deploy to GitHub Pages\" workflow run on main FAILED. Commit: \"" + .[0].displayTitle + "\". Run URL: " + .[0].url + ". The production site is serving stale content from a previous build. Investigate the build failure before pushing more commits.")}} else empty end' 2>/dev/null || true
